name: Viewer
summary: Core file navigation and windowing system for Personal OS - an Electron app that provides a desktop-like interface for browsing and editing files.
goals: Multi-window system with tabs, drag-and-drop, and tiling
Support markdown preview, code editing, and image viewing
currentState: Converted from browser app (React + Express) to standalone Electron app using electron-vite. IPC replaces REST API, file watching via chokidar in main process. Added a Cmd/Ctrl+Arrow fallback to keep window navigation working from text-input-focused apps like Terminal.
agentNotes: File watcher depth limited to 3 to avoid EMFILE errors on directories with many files. Uses .cjs extension for main/preload due to package.json having type:module. Config persists to Electron userData (~Library/Application Support/viewer/).
